CustomField.formula: IF(Client_Identifiers__c == 'Canaccede' || Client_Identifiers__c == 'Affirm', Null, CASE( $Profile.Name , 'SDA Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SDA__c , 'SDA Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SDA__c , 'SDA Login Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SDA__c , 'SPL Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c , 'SPL Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c, 'SPL Login Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c, 'SPL Login Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c, 'Scotia Bank Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c , 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c, 'Scotia Bank Login Community User', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c, 'Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Login Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c + No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c, 'Scotia SPL Common Community User Readonly', No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c + No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c, No_of_Secured_Accounts_SPL__c + No_of_Secured_Accounts_Scotia__c + No_of_Secured_Accounts_SDA__c ))
CustomField.label: Number of Secured Accounts
